creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-12-04 10:05:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-Template-Simple Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Template::Simple is a flexible, efficient and fast templating module
  for mod_perl written by Uri Guttman. It has a very simple markup
  scheme, but does nearly any templating task you could want as
  installed (and provides for callbacks if you want to extend it).
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Template-Simple/
  
  PR:             ports/163047
  Submitted by:   Ken McGlothlen <ken.mcglothlen@gmail.com>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3041    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/www/p5-Template-Simple/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/p5-Template-Simple/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-Template-Simple/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/p5-Template-Simple/pkg-plist (new)
